sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Even If Not…

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Golden idols rising high,
Crowds in fear, heads held low,
But we’re not shaped by trembling hands,
We only serve the God we know.
The drums are loud, the trumpets call,
The furnace waits with open jaws,
But there’s a fire inside of me,
That burns far brighter than their laws.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: And even if He doesn’t come,
We’re not alone, we’re not undone—
The truth is not undone by heat,
We won’t trade faith for a fleeting peace.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But if not, let it be known
We won't kneel, we won’t bow down
Even flames can't steal the crown
Our hearts are His, even now
But if not—we still believe
Let the fire speak for me

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The heat is real, the fear is loud,
The world demands we wear their chains,
But freedom rings in holy flames,
Where angels walk and God remains.
Don’t need to see the rescue plan,
To lift my eyes or take my stand,
My faith is forged in things unseen,
Like stars that shine through smoke and steam.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: And in the blaze, we saw a fourth,
No burn, no scream, no pain, no scorch—
A shadow shaped like heaven’s Son,
Still standing when the trial was done.
No chains, no ash upon our skin,
Just light and fire deep within,
The kind the world can’t understand,
But it’s the fire of God, not man.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: If He saves, or if He waits—
Still I’ll sing through smoke and gates,
He’s the only King I know,
So throw your fire—let it glow.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: But if not, let it be known
We won't kneel, we won’t bow down
Even flames can't steal the crown
Our hearts are His, even now
But if not—we still believe
Let the fire speak for me
Let the fire speak for me…
